overview: We are friends is a private social and educational app for a close-knit community with chat, quizzes, games, learning activities, attendance, and more.
features: Group and private 1-on-1 messaging with media support
Games box with 7 activities including Math, Vocabulary, and Coloring
New Learning Activities box with Writing, Reading, and Science
Attendance and level tracking for leaders
Red/blue space theme with planets and rocket
